title: Newtype popularity polls
wikitext:
[]: Newtype - popularity polls             Quote Post by BernardoCairo » Tue Jun 15, 2021 10:32 am SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: Newtype - popularity polls             Quote Post by Konja7 » Tue Jun 15, 2021 10:46 am BernardoCairo wrote: Asuka, as expected, is number one ! She was already the most popular Evangelion character before the movie. Now that Shin has given her the "deuteragonist treatment", It only makes sense for her to keep that position. Ayanami, Mari and Misato also managed to do pretty well! Shinji, as no one expected, is also number one ! Yeah, he has defeated Kaworu (seems like society has been evolving lol)! It looks like Shin has revamped him in many ways!

[]: Re: Newtype - popularity polls             Quote Post by BernardoCairo » Tue Jun 15, 2021 12:40 pm Yeah, maybe defeating Kaworu isn't that impressive (considering the environment in which the poll took place). That said, I still consider this to be a big "W" for Shinji. He always ends up in good positions, but this is the first time I've seen him in first. If it happened before, I personally don't remember ( maybe it occurred around the time HA came out, but I'm not entirely sure ) You know what? I still think that it is amazing to see Shinji over Kaworu in any type of popularity poll. Of course, I recognize that this is nothing "new" when it comes to Newtype. But, think about it. Kaworu has a huge and loyal fanbase, while Shinji is looked down upon by many. To see him in the number one spot is something really cool for me! As for Asuka. I'm sure I've seen her taking first place on a number of occasions before. The one that crosses my mind now happened in September 2009 (right after HA was released). SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: Newtype - popularity polls             Quote Post by Konja7 » Tue Jun 15, 2021 12:51 pm In the times of HA, Shinji has been in the first position for Newtype Magazine (September 2009):

[]: Re: Newtype - popularity polls             Quote Post by BernardoCairo » Tue Jun 15, 2021 1:07 pm Yeah, there it is. I had the impression that this had happened (I vaguely remembered this image in which he is talking to Kaji). Shinji and Asuka occupying the first position in their respective categories. Yeah, things haven't changed that much since the HA's release hahaha. I would like to know how well Shinji ranked at the time Q was released (something tells me he was in any position but the first hahaha). Anyway, coming first is not a constant for his character. It's cool to see him taking the number one spot.

[]: Re: Newtype - popularity polls             Quote Post by Konja7 » Tue Jun 15, 2021 1:27 pm I should mention that, in 2010, Newtype released Top characters for each decade: Top 10 1990's Male Characters: 1. Shinji Ikari (Evangelion) 2. Kaworu Nagisa (Evangelion) 3. Kurama (Yu Yu Hakusho) 4. Sakuragi Hanamichi (Slam Dunk) 5. Hiei (Yu Yu Hakusho) 6. Heero Yuy (Gundam Wing) 7. Mamoru Chiba/Tuxedo Mask (Sailor Moon) 8. Kenshin Himura (Rouroni Kenshin) 9. Conan Edgar (Detective Conan) 10. Besara Nekki (Macross 7) So, Shinji has always been appreciated in Newtype Magaine. The big change is for Rei and Asuka regarding Newtype. Top 10 1990's Female Characters: 1. Rei Ayanami (Evangelion) 2. Usagi Tsukino/Sailor Moon (Sailor Moon) 3. Asuka Langley Soryu (Evangelion) 4. Sakura Kinomoto (Cardcaptor Sakura) 5. Ruri Hoshino (Martian Sucessor Nadesico) 6. Nadia (Nadia: Secret of Blue Water) 7. Ami Mizuno/Sailor Mercury (Sailor Moon) 8. Mylerle Jenius (Macross 7) 9. Belldandy (Oh My Goddness!) 10. Deedlit (Record of Lodoss War) https://animesuperhero.com/forums/threa ... e.4995301/

[]: Re: Newtype - popularity polls             Quote Post by BernardoCairo » Tue Jun 15, 2021 2:16 pm That's weird. In most of the screenshots I've come across, Shinji ranked well, but almost never in first place (apart from these two cases we pointed out). Well, I was looking at popularity polls that took place during the 2000s/2010s and not the 90s. That changes things. As for Asuka, we all know that, in terms of popularity among Japanese audiences, Ayanami had the edge over her during the late 90s. However, this has changed over times. Let's not forget that she won last year's NHK's Evangelion Mega Poll . This, coupled with the great prominence she received in Shin, makes her current position not a surprise to me. Popularity polls, in general, are always fluctuating. Right after EOE's release, one of these was made. In the book Evangelion Forever , its results were shown. Asuka ranked number one, while Ayanami took the 5th place. That happened in 1997, which is surprising in a number of ways.

[]: Re: Newtype - popularity polls             Quote Post by Zethus Thorne » Tue Jun 15, 2021 2:17 pm Was it the latest Newtype listing?

[]: Re: Newtype - popularity polls             Quote Post by Konja7 » Tue Jun 15, 2021 2:26 pm BernardoCairo wrote: That's weird. In most of the screenshots I've come across, Shinji ranked well, but almost never in first place (apart from these two cases we pointed out). Well, I was looking at popularity polls that took place during the 2000s/2010s and not the 90s. That changes things.

[]: Re: Newtype - popularity polls             Quote Post by Kendrix » Tue Jun 15, 2021 2:39 pm The most notable thing, for me, is that Mari had a big jump. I don't think she was in the top 5 last time, now she ranks above Misato. It might be cause she finally got something like an emotional scene (after Asuka gets eaten, supposedly? I remember a lot of youtube comments like "I wasn't sure at first but I love Mari now shes such a good friend!") Does it say how many votes the girls are apart? IIt's probably a bit of a zeitgeist thing with Rei embodying the 90s better (plus she had more of a uniqueness factor back then - it's why genre defining designs often look plain today cause everything copied them) In my opinion, if Rei fans become a minority that just gives me extra edgy points. She's still 2nd place tho, still has loads more active avid fan than in the anglosphere. Good Rei FF used to be everywhere now its far & in between...

[]: Re: Newtype - popularity polls             Quote Post by Konja7 » Tue Jun 15, 2021 2:56 pm Kendrix wrote: The most notable thing, for me, is that Mari had a big jump. I don't think she was in the top 5 last time, now she ranks above Misato. It might be cause she finally got something like an emotional scene (after Asuka gets eaten, supposedly? I remember a lot of youtube comments like "I wasn't sure at first but I love Mari now shes such a good friend!")

[]: Re: Newtype - popularity polls             Quote Post by BernardoCairo » Tue Jun 15, 2021 4:03 pm Konja7 wrote: Could you tell me the other results of that poll in Evangelion Forever?

[]: Re: Newtype - popularity polls             Quote Post by Konja7 » Tue Jun 15, 2021 5:02 pm Yeah. Rei is still pretty popular. It isn't even a certain that Asuka will be above Rei in a Newtype magazine. If I'm not mistaken, this is a Newtype magazine released in April 2021: It isn't noticeable, but Rei is in position 6 (and it's mentioned the previous month she was in position 8). Asuka didn't appear in this poll. BernardoCairo wrote: 1 = Asuka Langley Soryu 2 = Kaworu Nagisa 3 = Shinji Ikari 4 = Misato Katsuragi 5 = Rei Ayanami 6 = Maya Ibuki 7 = Ryoji Kaji 8 = Gendo Ikari 9 = Ritsuko Akagi 10 = Pen Pen

[]: Re: Newtype - popularity polls             Quote Post by BernardoCairo » Tue Jun 15, 2021 6:20 pm Konja7 wrote: Thank you very much.

[]: Re: Newtype - popularity polls             Quote Post by Konja7 » Tue Jun 15, 2021 6:41 pm I start to suspect that the sudden appearance of Evangelion characters in the Newtype ranking is due to the Newtype magazine released in May 2021: The poll should have been realized in May 2021. BernardoCairo wrote: That's why I like to see Kaji reaching third place on Newtype's popularity poll. It never felt right for the second most important character in HA to get less attention than a guy who literally shows up for less than two minutes. I understand why this is the case, but c'mon hahaha! Anyway, I hope this boost in popularity means more prominence for the character going forward.

[]: Re: Newtype - popularity polls             Quote Post by BernardoCairo » Tue Jun 15, 2021 8:02 pm Yeah, people prefer the pilots and I'm aware of that. Honestly, it kills me to see Kensuke at the last place in NHK's Evangelion Mega Poll . I'm hoping the movie will raise his morale among the audience (it just makes sense considering his connections with Asuka and overall "cool factor"). Toji's placement is also a complete disgrace! He's behind Maya (even in the poll that came right after the original series)! That's just... It's unbearable to me hahaha! Actually, that's something interesting. These days, when you type "EVA pilots" into Google, the first thing that pops up are photos that include Mari and Kaworu. I have nothing against these characters, but c'mon! I want to see some content that focuses around Toji! To be honest, there are probably more fanarts depicting NGE than NTE to this day (because it's the more popular and influential continuity). Still, Toji barely shows up in these materials as well! I'm going crazy over here! I can't be the only Toji fan out there hahaha! Going back to Kaji, it's really a shame. I know it's easier to draw public attention to mecha pilots than a cool detective with love issues. I understand that. Still, Kaji is one of the most prevalent characters in the franchise (NGE, Sadamoto's manga, NTE and so on).

[]: Re: Newtype - popularity polls             Quote Post by Registration » Tue Jun 15, 2021 8:41 pm I bet that when the new SEED movie comes out, the Kira/Lacus will dominate it again for an entire era. If Amuro and Char are on the list almost 40 years (yeah, that is the origin char), imagine Kira and Lacus. Also, clearly the best girl in the 2.0 rank photo was Sheryl and it isn't even a question.

[]: Re: Newtype - popularity polls             Quote Post by Kendrix » Wed Jun 16, 2021 6:57 am Konja7 wrote: In times of Ha (September 2009), Mari was already 3rd position of female characters for Newtype magazine

[]: Re: Newtype - popularity polls             Quote Post by Konja7 » Wed Jun 16, 2021 7:29 am Kendrix wrote: It does kinda warm my heart to see Shinji occasionally ranking higher than the girls with how many ppl hate him. He does get loved, too.

[]: Re: Newtype - popularity polls             Quote Post by FelipeFritschF » Thu Jun 24, 2021 3:38 am BernardoCairo wrote: TAs for Asuka, we all know that, in terms of popularity among Japanese audiences, Ayanami had the edge over her during the late 90s. However, this has changed over times. Let's not forget that she won last year's NHK's Evangelion Mega Poll . This, coupled with the great prominence she received in Shin, makes her current position not a surprise to me.
